items.title: 3 Reasons Why This Unstoppable Dow Dividend King Can Deliver for Passive Income Investors in 2025
items.author: The Motley Fool
items.description: Procter & Gamble (PG), a Dow Dividend King, is expected to continue delivering for passive income investors in 2025 due to its strong business model, reliable dividend growth, and industry-leading margins.

insights.sentiment_reasoning: The article highlights Procter & Gamble's strong business model, reliable dividend growth, and industry-leading margins as reasons why it can continue delivering for passive income investors in 2025.
